title: Lead Generation Using Social Media Marketing - 1 day
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable customer-facing workshop for improving lead generation using social media marketing performance.
whyThisMatters: Lead Generation Using Social Media Marketing - 1 day helps sales, marketing, and service teams improve lead generation using social media marketing through clearer conversations, stronger follow-through, and more consistent customer handling. Participants practise Learning Objective, Brand Awareness, and Practical Exercises, Demonstration, and Application so they can apply the skills in real customer situations.
builtFor: Employees who manage customer conversations or expectations
walkAwayWith: Use clearer service or sales behaviors in everyday interactions.
Respond to difficult moments with more structure and confidence.
Align practical standards across the team.
methodologyCaption: Participants practise workplace conversations and customer-facing scenarios through role-play, feedback, and group reflection.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Lead Generation Using Social Media Marketing - 1 day.md
